seoDescription: Get creative with this giant ocean sunfish basking near ocean waves. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The ocean sunfish has a unique round, flattened body shape that ends in a short tail fin, resembling a giant swimming head.
The ocean sunfish loves basking on its side near the ocean surface, allowing sea birds to pick parasites off its skin.
